scripts.kill:4000: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($c) { $ids = $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($id in $ids) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; exit 0"
scripts.kill:8081: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($c) { $ids = $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($id in $ids) { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; exit 0"
scripts.start:unified: npm run build:web && npm run kill:4000 && npm --prefix backend run start
